title: 第 31 節
en: forth, O Spitama Zarathunra! she goes as far as the fifth and defiles the four.
31 (100). * If it be a porcupine dog, the Dnif Nasu rushes forth, O Spitama Zarathurtra! she goes as far as the fourth and defiles the three.
forth, O Spitama Zarathu^ra! she goes as far as the third and defiles the two.
32 (104). ' If it be an Aiwizu dog, the Dru^ Nasu rushes forth, O Spitama Zarathu5tra ! she goes as far as the second and defiles the next.
' If it be a Vlzu dog, the Dru^ Nasu rushes forth, O Spitama Zarathu5tra ! she goes as far as the next, she defiles the next.'
^ A dog without a master (see Farg. XIII, 19). ' A hunting-dog.
' Tbis name and the tivo following, Aiwiza and Vlzu, are lefl untranslated in the Pahlavi translation.
6o vendIdAd.
33 (108). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One f If it be a weasel \ how many of the creatures of the good spirit does it directly defile, how many does it indirectly defile ?

34(110). Ahura Mazda answered: *A weasel does neither directly nor indirectly defile any of the creatures of the good spirit, but him who smites and kills it ; to him the uncleanness clings for ever and ever^'

35 (i ^3)^- O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One I If the dead one be such a wicked, twofooted ruffian, as an ungodly Ashemaogha*, how many of the creatures of the good spirit does he directly defile, how many does he indirectly defile ?

36(115). Ahura Mazda answered: * No more than a frog does whose venom is dried up, and that has been dead more than a year*. Whilst alive, indeed, O Spitama Zarathurtra ! such a wicked, twolegged ruffian as an ungodly Ashemaogha, directly defiles the creatures of the good spirit, and indirectly defiles them.

37 (119)- 'Whilst alive he smites the water «; whilst alive he blows out the fire ' ; whilst alive he has been created to fight against the serpent garza and the other khrafstras that live in holes' (Bund. XIX, 37).
cleanness does not pass from him to another.
' §§ 35-38 ; cf. Farg. XII, 21-24. ^ Ashemaogha, a heretic.
hateful. Cf. Farg. XIV, 5.
' By defiling it (a capital crime; see Farg. VII, 25). ^ He extinguishes the Bahr&m fire (a capital crime ; cf. Farg. VII, 26).
FARGARD V. 6 1 carries oflf the cow ^ ; whilst alive he smites the faithful man with a deadly blow, that parts the soul from the body * ; not so will he do when dead.

38 (120). 'Whilst alive, indeed, O Spitama Zarathu^tra ! such a wicked, two-legged ruffian as an ungodly Ashemaogha robs the faithful man of the full possession of his food, of his clothing, of his wood, of his bed, of his vessels * ; not so will he do when dead*;

39 (122). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One I When into our houses here below we have brought the fire, the Baresma, the cups, the Haoma, and the mortar *, O holy Ahura Mazda ! if it come to pass that either a dog or a man dies there, what shall the worshippers of Mazda do ?

40(125). Ahura Mazda answered: *Out of the house, O Spitama Zarathu^tra ! shall they take the fire, the Baresma, the cups, the Haoma, and the mortar; they shall take the dead one out to the proper place * whereto, according to the law, corpses must be brought, to be devoured there.'
41 (128). O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One ! When shall they bring back the fire into the house wherein the man has died ?
^ As a cattle-lifter. * As an assassin.
' By defiling them, he deprives the faithful of their use.

lifetime, seizes him and drags him down to Ahriman ; therefore, his body, as the Dru^ is no longer with it, becomes pure. On the contrary, when it is a righteous man that dies, the AmshSspands take his soul to Ormazd and the Drug settles in the house of the body and makes it impure ' (Gujastak Abalish).
62 vend!dAd.

42 (129). Ahura Mazda answered : * They shall wait for nine nights in winter, for a month in summer \ and then they shall bring back the fire to the house wherein the man has died/ 43 (i3i)« O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One ! And if they shall bring back the fire to the house wherein the man has died, within the nine nights, or within the months what penalty shall they pay ?
44 ( 1 34). Ahura Mazda answered : * They shall be Peshdtanus : two hundred stripes with the Aspah6ajtra, two hundred stripes with the Sraosh6-iarana.'

45 (135)*^ O Maker of the material world, thou Holy One I If in the house of a worshipper of Mazda there be a woman with child, and if being a month gone, or two, or three, or four, or five, or six, or seven, or eight, or nine, or ten months gone ^ she bring forth a still-born child, what shall the worshippers of Mazda do ?

46 (i 39). Ahura Mazda answered : * The place in that Mazdean house whereof the ground is the cleanest and the driest, and the least passed through by flocks, and herds, by the fire of Ahura Mazda, by the consecrated bundles of Baresma, and by the faithful;'—
zh: 前行吧，聖蛇婆摩·查拉圖斯特拉！她延伸至第五層，並玷污了四層。
31 (100). * 若是豪豬狗，德尼夫‧納蘇衝出去，噢斯皮塔瑪‧查拉圖斯特拉！她行進到第四處並玷污了三處。
「去吧，噢斯比塔馬·瑪琐亞斯特拉！她走到第三層，並玷汙了其他兩層。」
32 (104)。「倘若是一隻艾維祖（Aiwizu）之犬，惡魔納蘇（Dru^ Nasu）便衝將出來，斯庇塔瑪·瑣羅亞斯德啊！她行至第二處，並汙穢其次。」
『若牠是一隻狗，德魯惡靈（Dru Nasu）便衝向前去，啊，史比塔瑪‧琐罗亚斯德！她奔向下一具，她玷汙下一具。』
^ 一隻沒有主人的狗（見《法戈德》第十三卷，第19節）。' 一隻獵犬。
此名稱及隨後的兩個名字阿維札（Aiwiza）與維祖（Vlzu），在巴列維譯本中均保持未譯的狀態。

I appreciate your detailed instructions for translation, but the text provided ("6o vendIdAd") does not appear to be English text from Friedrich Max Müller's 1873 *Introduction to the Science of Religion*. This appears to be either: - Corrupted or garbled text - An OCR scanning error - Non-English characters misinterpreted as English Could you please provide the correct English source text that needs to be translated into Traditional Chinese? Once you share the accurate passage, I will be happy to translate it according to all the guidelines you've outlined.
33 (108). 物質世界的造物主啊，聖潔者！如果它是一隻黃鼠狼\，它直接污染了良善精靈的多少生物，它間接污染了多少生物？
34(110). 阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答道：「黃鼠狼既不直接也不間接地玷污善靈的任何受造物，只有擊殺它的人；不潔之物永遠與他相伴永遠。」
35 (i ^3)^- 物質世界的造物者啊，聖者哉！如果死者是如此邪惡的兩足惡棍，如同不敬神的阿什瑪歐格哈（Ashemaogha）*，那麼他直接玷污了美善精靈的多少生靈，又間接玷污了多少呢？
36(115)。阿胡拉‧馬茲達答道：「不超過一年以上已死且毒液乾涸的青蛙那樣多」。誠然，當其活著之時，啊斯皮塔瑪‧查拉圖斯特拉！這樣的邪惡的兩足粗鄙漢，如同不敬神的阿什瑪奧格哈（Ashemaogha），直接褻瀆善靈之造物，也間接褻瀆之。
37 (119)—「他在活著時擊打水；他在活著時吹滅火；他在活著時被創造來與蛇 garza 及其他住在洞穴中的 khrafstras 對抗」(Bund. XIX, 37)。
清淨不會從他傳遞給另一個人。
'§§ 35-38；參閱 Farg. XII, 21-24。^ Ashemaogha，一名異教徒。
令人厭惡的。參照《法爾加德》(Farg.) 第十四卷，第五節。
藉由汙穢它（死罪；參見 Farg. VII, 25）。^ 他熄滅拜火教聖火（死罪；參見 Farg. VII, 26）。
第五法格德 61 奪走牛隻；當其活著時，牠以致命的一擊打擊信徒，使靈魂與肉體分離*；但當其死後便不會如此作為。
38 (120). 「活著的時候，確實啊，史皮塔瑪·瑣羅亞斯德啊！這樣一個邪惡的、兩足的惡棍，一個不敬神的阿舍摩格哈（Ashemaogha）會搶奪忠實者對其食物、衣服、木柴、床榻、器皿*的完全佔有；但當他死後就不會這樣做了*；」
39 (122)。物質世界的造物者，神聖者啊！當我們在下面的房屋中帶進火焰、巴雷斯瑪、杯子、豪瑪和研鉢時*，神聖的阿胡拉‧瑪茲達啊！如果在那裡發生狗或人死亡的事，那麼瑪茲達的崇拜者應該怎麼做呢？
阿胡拉‧瑪茲達回答：「史皮塔瑪‧查拉圖斯特拉啊！他們應當將火、聖枝束（Baresma）、聖杯、贊蒼酒（Haoma）和杵臼從房中帶出；他們應當將亡者運往適當的地點，即依照法律，屍體必須被送往之處，以供在彼處被吞噬。」
41（128）。啊，物質世界之造物主，神聖者！他們何時才能將火再次帶入那個人已死去的房屋？
^ 作為牲畜竊賊。* 作為刺客。
藉由褻瀆它們，他使信徒喪失了使用它們的機會。
一生之中，邪靈抓住他並將他拖向阿赫里曼；因此，他的身體既然不再與德魯同在（Drû），就變得純淨了。相反地，當一個義人死亡時，亞美沙斯賓德們將他的靈魂帶到歐瑪茲德那裡，而藥（Drug）則降臨到身體之家，使其變得不潔淨」（《古加斯塔克‧阿巴利什》Gujastak Abalish）。
我注意到您提供的「英文原文」只有「62 vend!dAd.」這一行，這看起來不是英文，而是似乎指向瑣羅亞斯德教文獻中的《萬德達德》（Vendidad）的第62節。 請提供完整的英文原文文本，我將按照您的規則進行準確的繁體中文翻譯。
42 (129)。阿胡拉‧馬茲達回答道：「他們應在冬季等待九個夜晚，在夏季等待一個月，然後他們應將火帶回那個人去世的房屋。」 43 (131)。「物質世界的創造者啊，聖潔者啊！如果他們在九個夜晚之內，或在數月之內將火帶回那個人去世的房屋，他們應承受什麼懲罰？」
44（1 34）。阿胡拉‧瑪茲達答曰：「他們應為佩什德塔努斯（Peshdtanus）：以阿斯帕赫-傑特拉（Aspah6ajtra）鞭打二百下，以斯拉歐什-亞拉那（Sraosh6-iarana）鞭打二百下。」
45 (135)*^ 物質世界的造物者啊，至聖者！若在瑣羅亞斯德教徒的家中有一個懷孕的婦女，且若她已懷孕一個月、或兩個月、或三個月、或四個月、或五個月、或六個月、或七個月、或八個月、或九個月、或十個月，她產下一個死胎，瑣羅亞斯德教徒應當做什麼呢？
46 (i 39)。阿胡拉‧瑪茲達答道：「在該瑣羅亞斯德宅邸中，地面最潔淨、最乾燥的地方，並且最少被羊群和牲畜、阿胡拉‧瑪茲達的聖火、被祝聖的巴雷斯瑪束 (Baresma)，以及信徒們所踐踏的地方。」
